name: Somaliland (1991–1996)

colors.symbolism: the Arabic shahada script encircling the disc

description: A white field with a central green disc encircled by the Arabic inscription of the Islamic shahada in black script.
history: The provisional flag adopted by the self-declared Republic of Somaliland after its declaration of independence from Somalia on 18 May 1991. Designed by General Mohamoud Suleiman Harun, it was criticised as too simple and as too closely tied to the founding movement rather than being neutral, and was replaced by the current green-white-red flag on 14 October 1996.

features.role: Arabic shahada encircling the disc — 'There is no god but Allah; Muhammad is the messenger of Allah'
